zh.lifeSummary: De Luttrell是De Luttrell的兒子，出生。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: De Luttrell是De Luttrell的儿子，出生。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Luttrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): from a diminutive of Old French loutre ‘otter’ (from Latin lutra), applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble an otter, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who hunted otters (for their pelts). Compare Luter and Litteral .

variants.name: Luter
meanings: from Old French loutre ‘otter’, either used as a nickname, or alternatively as a metonymic occupational name to denote an otter hunter.

en.lifeSummary: De Luttrell was born as the son of De Luttrell. He had at least 1 son.

de.lifeSummary: De Luttrell wurde, als Sohn von De Luttrell geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: De Luttrell è nato il come figlio di De Luttrell. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: De LuttrellはDe Luttrellの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: De Luttrell(은)는 De Luttrell의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: De Luttrell nasceu filho de De Luttrell. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: De Luttrell родился. Его отца звали De Luttrell. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: De Luttrell nació como hijo de De Luttrell. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
